symbol.description: Canonical instrument identifier (e.g., AAPL, BTC-USD, FIGI/SecId if you prefer).

timestamp.description: Bar open timestamp (inclusive, UTC RFC3339 with Z suffix). Always required.

timestamp_local.description: Bar open timestamp in local exchange/session time (RFC3339 with offset, e.g., 2024-03-10T09:30:00-05:00 for NYSE). Optional - only include if local session semantics are relevant (e.g., equity markets with trading hours). Omit for 24/7 markets like crypto.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for the primary trading venue (e.g., 'America/New_York' for NYSE, 'Asia/Tokyo' for TSE). Optional - helps consumers understand local context and recompute local time if needed.

open.description: Base adapter open price emitted at runtime (decimal as string). For the canonical ClickHouse path this is the raw OHLC series.

high.description: Base adapter high price emitted at runtime (decimal as string). For the canonical ClickHouse path this is the raw OHLC series.

low.description: Base adapter low price emitted at runtime (decimal as string). For the canonical ClickHouse path this is the raw OHLC series.

close.description: Base adapter close price emitted at runtime (decimal as string). For the canonical ClickHouse path this is the raw OHLC series.

open_adj.description: Open price (total-return adjusted: splits + dividends, decimal as string). Optional. May be null if unavailable.

high_adj.description: High price (total-return adjusted: splits + dividends, decimal as string). Optional. May be null if unavailable.

low_adj.description: Low price (total-return adjusted: splits + dividends, decimal as string). Optional. May be null if unavailable.

close_adj.description: Close price (total-return adjusted: splits + dividends, decimal as string). Optional. May be null if unavailable.

volume.description: Strategy-facing runtime volume series. For the canonical ClickHouse path this is the adjusted volume; other adapters may use their only available runtime series.

volume_raw.description: Optional raw/runtime-unadjusted volume series. Null when the adapter does not expose a distinct raw series.

volume_adj.description: Optional adjusted runtime volume series. Null when the adapter does not expose a distinct adjusted series.

source.description: Dataset or producer identifier for the runtime bar source.
